channel.title: Design on Segflow
channel.description: Recent content in Design on Segflow

item.title: The case against helper packages named `utils`
item.description: I argued earlier that a function’s signature should never lie, and then that errors are values only if you treat them like values. Both posts circled the same question at different scales: what is this code for? This one closes the loop at the package level. The short version: if your package is named utils, you don’t have an answer.
